reviews.review_msg: Great prof when you're in-person! Not the most accessible outside of class (but made her email habits clear from the get-go), so keep that in mind. Super engaging lectures with interesting content. I highly recommend taking GSWS103 instead of 102! Only wish she communicated cancelled/online classes more than the evening before/morning of lectures.

Taught a first year class like it was meant for a first year starting, brought her dog named "Legs" and made lectures so much more fun. Felt like she actually enjoyed teaching and was engaging, drawing activity and quiz most weeks, 3 short writing assignments that were pretty easy (word count never over 750). Hard to reach through email.

Coleman is an amazing passionate professor that cares for her students. Attendance isn't mandatory however if you don't go you miss weekly drawing activities which is how you get marks for attendance (.25 each). Her quizzes are simple and few papers. I highly recommend her even though there are some weeks online. She brings her dog sometimes too!
